short_description: 11 daily football trivia games: guess the player, fill the XI, solve the grid!
full_description:
Test your football knowledge every day with 11 daily trivia games!

THE DAILY LINEUP:
- Career Path: name the player from their club history
- My Name Is...: guess the mystery player from clues
- The Grid: one player for every club crossing
- Missing XI: fill in a famous starting lineup
- Connections: sort 16 players into 4 hidden groups
- Top Lists: name everyone on today's ranking
- Higher / Lower: who's worth more? Build a streak
- Transfer Agent: match players to their transfers
- Blind Ranking: rank five players without peeking
- Career Timeline: rebuild a career club by club
- Guess the Match: name the fixture from its XI

FEATURES:
- New daily puzzles every midnight
- Thousands of real footballers past and present
- Difficulty ramps through the week: warm-up Mondays to expert Saturdays
- Track your daily streak and personal bests
- Share spoiler-free result cards with friends
- Works offline - play anywhere, anytime
- No ads in gameplay - clean, focused experience
- Privacy-first: no account required, no personal data collected

STATS & STREAKS:
- Daily streak counter
- Detailed per-game stats and solve times
- Rank ladder from Kickoff to Legend

PERFECT FOR:
- Football fans who love trivia
- Daily puzzle enthusiasts
- Fans of Wordle-style guessing games
- Anyone who wants a quick 5-minute brain teaser

New content updated regularly. Download now and start your streak!
